text: Creates a non-player lift. A non-player lift is a lift that doesn't belong to any player.
params: World to place the lift in.
Position to place the lift at.
Body to place on the lift (optional).
Level to place the lift at. (Defaults to 0.)
Rotation index to place the lift at. (Defaults to 0.)

text: Creates a virtual lift. A virtual lift is a lift that doesn't exist in the game world. But allows for a static body to be placed on it.
params: World to place the lift in.
Body to place on the lift.
